sequence.variables:
sample_rate = float(250000000,1e7,5e9) mw_freq = float(3.873000000000000e+09, 1e6, 15e9) det=float(5e6, -10e6, 10e6); mod_depth = float(1,0,1); % SHG 2023.02.09 0.5685 length_pi_pulse = float(52e-9, 2e-9, 0.5) tau = float(1e-6,0,1e-3) switch_delay = float(1.000000000000000e-07,0,500e-9) %delay_wrt_1mus = float(-0.88e-6,-0.1,0.1) % 1DExp-seq-Rabimodulated-vary-delay_wrt_1mus-2022-09-29-182523 %OLD 68e-9 calibrated by PL curve 11-08-05 13-17-48 delay_wrt_1mus = float(0.2e-6,-0.1,0.1) % DLnsec LASER 1DExp-seq-Rabimodulated-vary-delay_wrt_1mus-2023-10-09-183857 wait_time = float(2e-6, 0,1)
mw_ampl = float(-5, -20, 15) ampIQ = float(5,-30,17) %in dBm freqIQ = float(50e6, 0,500*1e6)
%adiabatic inversion do_adiabatic_inversion = boolean(1) sweep_range = float(100e6, 80e6, 500e6) sweep_time = float(1e-6, 20e-9, 10e-6) full_experiment = float(0, 0, 1) % SHG 2023.02.09 1
